positive: A detailed, stylized illustration of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) sitting gracefully among blooming night flowers. The fox should have a majestic, luminous fur texture and nine prominent, flowing tails. The scene must be set against a deep midnight blue and violet gradient background, illuminated by soft, glowing moonlight and scattered bioluminescent particles. Focus on high contrast and clean, defined silhouettes. The overall style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and modern minimalist Japanese woodblock print aesthetics (Ukiyo-e influence). Composition must be centered and symmetrical, suitable for a chest print. Use flat color washes with metallic gold line work accents for elegance. Studio shot, high detail, vector art quality, vibrant colors, cinematic lighting, ultra high resolution.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, fuzzy, messy, messy composition, photorealistic, CGI, signature
